TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Brisker, title = John_Brisker, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Brisker} }

S.FORM: John Brisker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, John Brisker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
John Brisker sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1947, ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, John Brisker, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn βris~ɕker s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħn βris~ɕker, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
